subject: [PATCH 4/4] mm: Fix demotion gfp by preserving initial gfp reclaim policy

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's approach to preserving initial gfp flags. Suggested an alternative solution using a different variable to store the modified gfp mask.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series fixes a demotion gfp issue by preserving the initial gfp reclaim policy when allocating migration targets. The problem arises when src folios are hugetlb pages, causing htlb_modify_alloc_mask() to unconditionally enable reclaim. To fix this, the patch introduces a new variable gfp_entry to preserve the initial gfp flags.
